deferred_entries.name: hebrew_verb_complements_lexicon
deferred_entries.notes: Manifest-only until an official downloadable source is provided. Supported local TSV/CSV columns include verb_root, verb_binyan, verb_LexiconItem, verb_dottedLexiconItem, complement_LexiconItem.

deferred_entries.name: chembl_local_export
deferred_entries.notes: Use scripts/prepare_science_sources.py --kind chembl on local ChEMBL CSV/TSV exports with SMILES, target sequence/name, assay type/value, and units.

deferred_entries.name: bindingdb_local_export
deferred_entries.notes: Use scripts/prepare_science_sources.py --kind bindingdb on local BindingDB TSV/CSV exports.

deferred_entries.name: ugm_multimodal_local
deferred_entries.notes: Use scripts/prepare_multimodal_sources.py on reviewed local exports from UniProt/InterPro/PDB/AlphaFoldDB/GEOM/SPICE/OMol25/PubChem/ChEMBL/RNAcentral/Rfam/RNA3DHub-style sources.

deferred_entries.name: pdbbind_docking_local
deferred_entries.notes: Use scripts/prepare_science_sources.py --kind pdbbind on local protein-ligand docking rows with ligand SMILES, protein sequence, pocket atoms/coordinates, and affinity.

deferred_entries.name: ec_protein_generation_local
deferred_entries.notes: Use scripts/prepare_science_sources.py --kind ec on local EC-number protein FASTA/CSV rows.

manifest_entries.name: openmathinstruct2_train_1m
manifest_entries.notes: Large synthetic math corpus; sample only by default.

manifest_entries.name: moleculenet_lipophilicity
manifest_entries.notes: HF metadata reports unknown license; smoke-test only until provenance is reviewed.

manifest_entries.name: unigenx_qm9_train
manifest_entries.notes: QM9-style molecule rows with atom symbols, coordinates, SMILES, and properties for UniGenX-style graphification.

manifest_entries.name: unigenx_materials_crystal_system
manifest_entries.notes: Instruction rows mapping Materials Project formulas to crystal-system labels; used as a lightweight material graph smoke source.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_sefaria_train
manifest_entries.notes: Sefaria-derived Hebrew text rows; graphified with heuristic shoresh/template nodes.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_synthetic_medical_train
manifest_entries.notes: Synthetic Hebrew medical notes. Sparse dataset card; smoke-test only until provenance is reviewed.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_wikianswers_lists
manifest_entries.notes: Question-like Hebrew text grouped by set_id.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_wikianswers_queries
manifest_entries.notes: Query side of Hebrew WikiAnswers sentence-similarity data.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_alpaca_train
manifest_entries.notes: Hebrew instruction/input/output rows.

manifest_entries.name: talmud_hebrew_train
manifest_entries.notes: Talmud Hebrew text rows; graphified as Hebrew text plus heuristic roots.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_wikipedia_train
manifest_entries.notes: MIT-tagged Hebrew Wikipedia text rows.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_ud_htb
manifest_entries.notes: Universal Dependencies Hebrew HTB CoNLL-U treebank; structured morphology backbone.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_qa_nnlp
manifest_entries.notes: HeQ Hebrew QA dataset repository.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_nakdimon
manifest_entries.notes: Nakdimon Hebrew diacritizer repo. Uses available diacritized text/test files when cloned with submodules.

manifest_entries.name: hebrew_verb_complements_lexicon
manifest_entries.notes: Manifest-only until an official downloadable source is provided. Supported local TSV/CSV columns include verb_root, verb_binyan, verb_LexiconItem, verb_dottedLexiconItem, complement_LexiconItem.

manifest_entries.name: binding_affinity_public
manifest_entries.notes: Protein-sequence/ligand-SMILES binding affinity substitute sourced from BindingDB/PDBbind/BioLIP/BindingMOAD; review upstream license before scaling.
